computed.name: =CQP_MAXIMUM_INVENTORIES_USD * CQP_MAXIMUM_INVENTORIES_GROSS_RATE
=((CQP_MAXIMUM_INVENTORIES_USD/CQP_MAXIMUM_INVENTORIES_HISTORICAL_TERMS)-1)*100
=CQP_AVERAGE_INVENTORIES_USD * CQP_AVERAGE_INVENTORIES_GROSS_RATE
=((CQP_AVERAGE_INVENTORIES_USD/CQP_AVERAGE_INVENTORIES_HISTORICAL_TERMS)-1)*100
=CQP_MAXIMUM_INVENTORIES_USD + CQP_AVERAGE_INVENTORIES_USD
=(CQP_MAXIMUM_INVENTORIES_VARIATION + CQP_AVERAGE_INVENTORIES_VARIATION)/2
Validation that checks inventory fields only if CQP_STORAGE_FILLED is true.

Validation that ensures exactly one of CQP_SELECTED_STORAGE_MAX 
or CQP_SELECTED_STORAGE_AVE is selected
Summary of AVERAGE and MAXIMUM
Get percentage ONLY from TYPE="STORAGE" inside CQP_COMMODITIES_FILTERED
